name: verified-code
summary: Generate, review, debug, and refactor code in any language. Optimized for accuracy and clean output. Powered by Evolink.ai
description: A comprehensive code assistant that generates working code (not templates), reviews for security/performance issues, debugs errors with context, and refactors legacy codebases. Supports Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, Go, Rust, Java, and C/C++ with automatic syntax verification.
